summary: Nudge Coach Feature - Complete Testing. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features verified. Nudge modal works with reason presets, prefilled/editable subject & message, cooldown indicators show correctly, nudge buttons only appear for needs_support/activating coaches.
critical_code_review_comments: Nudge API properly validates required fields (coach_id, subject, message) and returns 400 for missing fields
24-hour cooldown logic correctly implemented with proper 429 response and informative error message
Nudge history endpoint returns correctly sorted results (sent_at desc) with delivery_status and last_error
GET /api/roster/activation correctly includes last_nudge_at and last_nudge_status per coach
Frontend NudgeModal has all required data-testid attributes for automated testing
Reason presets: onboarding_incomplete, no_recent_activity, needs_help, custom - all present and selectable
Prefilled subject includes director name, message is personalized with coach name - good UX
Cooldown indicator shows 'Sent Today' or similar for coaches nudged within 24h
Nudge buttons correctly appear only for needs_support and activating coaches (not active/pending)
MOCKED: Resend is in test mode - email delivery returns 'failed' status but nudge is still logged in DB
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test coaches. Several coaches in cooldown from previous nudge tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nudge Coach feature fully verified. Key endpoints: POST /api/roster/nudge (sends email, logs nudge, enforces 24h cooldown), GET /api/roster/nudge-history/{coach_id} (sorted by sent_at desc), GET /api/roster/activation (includes last_nudge_at, last_nudge_status). Nudge modal: data-testid='nudge-modal', reason pills: data-testid='nudge-reason-{key}', send button: data-testid='nudge-send-btn', subject: data-testid='nudge-subject-input', message: data-testid='nudge-message-input'. Cooldown indicator: data-testid='nudge-cooldown-{coach_id}'. Email delivery is MOCKED (Resend test mode) - nudges log as delivery_status='failed' with last_error set. 21 coaches total with 15 needs_support and 6 activating status.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/roster/nudge - requires director role (403 for coaches) ✓
POST /api/roster/nudge - requires coach_id, subject, message (400 if missing) ✓
POST /api/roster/nudge - returns 429 with cooldown message if nudged within 24h ✓
POST /api/roster/nudge - stores delivery_status and last_error in nudges collection ✓
GET /api/roster/nudge-history/{coach_id} - returns list sorted by sent_at desc ✓
GET /api/roster/nudge-history/{coach_id} - includes delivery_status and last_error fields ✓
GET /api/roster/activation - includes last_nudge_at and last_nudge_status per coach ✓
frontend_components: Nudge buttons appear for needs_support and activating coaches only ✓
No nudge button for active or pending coaches ✓
Clicking Nudge opens modal with reason presets ✓
Reason presets present: Onboarding incomplete, No recent activity, Needs help getting started, Custom ✓
Subject field is prefilled with director name and editable ✓
Message field is prefilled with personalized content and editable ✓
Reason preset selection changes styling correctly ✓
Cooldown indicator shows 'Sent Xh ago' when within 24h cooldown ✓
Modal closes via Cancel button and X button ✓
Send Check-in button present and functional ✓

mocked_api_note: Resend email service is in test mode. Nudges are logged with delivery_status='failed' and last_error set, but this is expected behavior. The nudge functionality (cooldown, history, UI) all work correctly.
